BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout5_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout5_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, the Wild Transformation Feature may be randomly triggered and either Girl symbol, Man symbol, Gun symbol, Cartridge symbol or First Aid symbol will be revealed in the center of the middle reel.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: During the Wild Transformation Feature, any symbol on the reels that matches the revealed symbol will be transformed into Wild symbol.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: The revealed symbol in the center of the middle reel will stay at its position as a Wild symbol until the end of the spin.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
BattlegroundRoyalePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_4: At the start of every free spin, the Wild Transformation Feature is triggered.

BattlegroundRoyaleRule.Rule1_1: Battleground Royale is a 5-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 5, 4 rows in reels 2 and 4, 5 rows in reel 3) video slot featuring Wild symbol transformation with increasing multiplier.
BattlegroundRoyaleRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{720} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
BattlegroundRoyaleRule.Rule1_19: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
